__comment: Dashboard-as-code for the bacnet_point measurement written by the BACnet Historian. Provisioned into Grafana by the Observability Pack supervisor. Referenced by the bacnet-historian manifest's `dashboards` field.
title: BACnet — Point Trends

targets.query:
from(bucket: "utilities")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bacnet_point" and r._field == "present_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["object", "label"])
